compiled_state.title: Register check-portability.sh as pre-commit hook
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add check-portability.sh to .pre-commit-config.yaml as a new pre-commit hook. Follow the pattern of existing hooks (executable-guard, format-and-lint).

### Hook registration:
Add to .pre-commit-config.yaml repos[0].hooks:
```yaml
- id: portability-check
  name: Portability Check (5s timeout)
  entry: ./plugins/dso/scripts/pre-commit-wrapper.sh portability-check 5 "plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh"
  language: system
  pass_filenames: true
  stages: [pre-commit]
```

Note: pass_filenames: true means pre-commit passes staged filenames to the script. The 5s timeout via pre-commit-wrapper.sh follows the existing pattern.

### TDD Exemption
Unit test exempt. Justification: (1) No conditional logic — YAML config entry is declarative, (2) any test would be a change-detector test asserting the YAML key exists, (3) infrastructure-boundary-only — pre-commit framework configuration.

### File Impact
- .pre-commit-config.yaml (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] portability-check hook registered in .pre-commit-config.yaml
  Verify: grep -q 'portability-check' .pre-commit-config.yaml
- [ ] Hook entry references check-portability.sh
  Verify: grep -A3 'portability-check' .pre-commit-config.yaml | grep -q 'check-portability.sh'
- [ ] Hook uses pre-commit-wrapper.sh pattern
  Verify: grep -A3 'portability-check' .pre-commit-config.yaml | grep -q 'pre-commit-wrapper.sh'

comments.body: AC amendment: Use pass_filenames: false (matching all other hooks in .pre-commit-config.yaml). check-portability.sh discovers staged files internally via git diff --cached --name-only. The pre-commit-wrapper.sh only reads 3 positional args — pass_filenames: true would silently append unused args. Place hook after executable-guard but before format-and-lint (lightweight, fail-fast ordering).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
